'''majama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yachtful|yachtful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yachtful|yachtful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| majama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjæmæth|mæjæmæth]] || [[word:mæjæmæj|mæjæmæj]] || [[word:mæjæmæsh|mæjæmæsh]] || [[word:mæjæmæ|mæjæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:majajamath|majajamath]] || [[word:majajamaj|majajamaj]] || [[word:majajamash|majajamash]] || [[word:majajama|majajama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:majamath|majamath]] || [[word:majamaj|majamaj]] || [[word:majamash|majamash]] || [[word:majama|majama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:majafmath|majafmath]] || [[word:majafmaj|majafmaj]] || [[word:majafmash|majafmash]] || [[word:majafmaf|majafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majamatha|majamatha]] || [[word:majamaja|majamaja]] || [[word:majamasha|majamasha]] || [[word:majamaka|majamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majamath|majamath]] || [[word:majamaj|majamaj]] || [[word:majamash|majamash]] || [[word:majama|majama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majamathal|majamathal]] || [[word:majamajal|majamajal]] || [[word:majamashal|majamashal]] || [[word:majamakal|majamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majamathatha|majamathatha]] || [[word:majamajaja|majamajaja]] || [[word:majamashasha|majamashasha]] || [[word:majamaka|majamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majamathan|majamathan]] || [[word:majamajan|majamajan]] || [[word:majamashan|majamashan]] || [[word:majamakan|majamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majamathaoro|majamathaoro]] || [[word:majamajaoro|majamajaoro]] || [[word:majamashaoro|majamashaoro]] || [[word:majamakaoro|majamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
